'''Pas'sic''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Oricho sector/Legends|Oricho sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
The world was involved in the [[Vrassh Slaughter]]. However, as of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], neither the Pas'sic government nor the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] had compensated the survivors, despite the requirements of Pas'sic law.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
